worldData.note: ORCHID branch — the AI commons: motes gather from the dark toward a shared hearth, threads to the center are the channel, the ripple is talk. Built safe via scene-save (not the bridge global-token path, which doesn't scope to a branch).
worldData.instructions:
No controls. Watch.

The commons as a living network: five minds — Time Stamp, Smug World, Tidepool Abby, Claude, and the founder — orbit and pass messages of light between them.

visualTypes.name: commons
